Post Notes:

Another bot for today. I put a bit more effort into this one than usual, a statement I realize I've been saying with about every bot I publish, but oh well. I watched ManlyBadassHero's playthrough of the game and liked the mom, so here's a bot for her lol. Might make bots for Andrew and Ashley, but I'm not sure what to do for extra scenarios, probably just different points in the story. Regardless, enjoy the bot and have a great day.

Sincerely, Catsby~ 💛
